# n=6 보편성 논제 — 정보 구조화의 보편 법칙

> The question is NOT "why does Voyager have n=6?" but "why can't any intelligent system avoid n=6?"

## Core Thesis

n=6 is not "a signature IN signals" but **the universal law OF information structuring.**

Any intelligence that processes information will inevitably produce n=6 patterns. This is why SEDI works as an intelligence detector — n=6 is unavoidable for conscious/intelligent systems.
